Added_Other.name: DFFlagEnableOverridingAndroidExitReasonsAsSuccess
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows developers to set custom exit reasons for Android apps as successful.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides clearer feedback to players about why an app closed, improving user understanding.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagSimParentPrimSpacePVsRead
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables reading simulation parent properties in a specific space.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves how game objects interact with their parent objects, enhancing gameplay dynamics.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagSimCacheHumanoidScale2
Added_Physics.mechanism: Enhances caching for humanoid scale data.
Added_Physics.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag for character scaling.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagTriangleMeshPartDefaultCollisionGeometry
Added_Physics.mechanism: Changes the default collision geometry for triangle mesh parts.
Added_Physics.purpose: Enhances the accuracy of collisions in games, leading to a smoother gameplay experience.

Changed_Other.name: DFFlagFlagRolloutTestDynamicBool1
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tests a dynamic boolean flag that can change during runtime.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows for more flexible feature testing and adjustments based on player feedback.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagFlagRolloutTestStaticBool1
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tests a static boolean flag for feature rollout.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to experiment with new features safely.
